results.rendered_html:
auttara (von uttara) adj. im Norden wohnend (?): yatrauttarāṇāṃ sarveṣāmṛṣīṇāṃ nāhuṣasya ca . agneścaivātra saṃvādaḥ kāśyapasya ca (in Kāśmīra)  MBH. 3,10546 . Oder ist etwa yatro˚ zu lesen?
— Vgl. autra.

results.rendered_html:
auttara a.
— (rī -rā) [uttara-aṇ] Northern, living in the north.
Comp.
— aha a. belonging to the following day.
— pathika a. going in the northern direction.
— padika a. comprehended in the last word or term.
